scripts.build:vercel: pnpm generate:llms && pnpm payload migrate && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation next build --webpack
scripts.generate:types: pnpm run generate:types:cloudflare && pnpm run generate:types:payload
scripts.generate:types:cloudflare: pnpm exec wrangler types --env-interface CloudflareEnv cloudflare-env.d.ts
scripts.cf:build: cross-env OPEN_NEXT_INNER_BUILD=1 pnpm exec opennextjs-cloudflare build
scripts.preview: pnpm run cf:build && pnpm exec opennextjs-cloudflare preview
scripts.deploy: pnpm run deploy:database && pnpm run deploy:app
scripts.opennext:build: pnpm generate:llms && cross-env OPEN_NEXT_INNER_BUILD=1 NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation pnpm exec opennextjs-cloudflare build
scripts.deploy:app: pnpm run opennext:build && pnpm exec opennextjs-cloudflare deploy
scripts.workers:build: pnpm run deploy:database && pnpm run opennext:build
scripts.upload: pnpm run cf:build && pnpm exec opennextjs-cloudflare upload
scripts.cf-typegen: pnpm exec wrangler types --env-interface CloudflareEnv cloudflare-env.d.ts
scripts.deploy:cloudflare:dry: pnpm run opennext:build && pnpm exec wrangler deploy --dry-run
scripts.deploy:dry: pnpm run deploy:vercel:dry && pnpm run deploy:cloudflare:dry

_futureDependencies._comment: Not installed — JSON cannot use // comments; copy a line into dependencies/devDependencies when you implement the feature.

ANALYZE.description: Optional. Set to `true` only when running `pnpm analyze` (Next bundle analyzer).

BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN.description: Vercel Blob read/write token — **Vercel + Postgres path only** (`@payloadcms/storage-vercel-blob`). Omit on Cloudflare R2.

CLOUDFLARE_ENV.description: Optional. Wrangler environment name for `getPlatformProxy` when resolving bindings locally (see Payload Cloudflare template).

CLOUDFLARE_REMOTE_BINDINGS.description: Optional. Set to `true` so local dev uses **remote** D1/R2/etc. via Wrangler (`getPlatformProxy` + `initOpenNextCloudflareForDev`) — pairs with `CLOUDFLARE_ENV`.

CRON_SECRET.description: Optional. Bearer for Payload `jobs` / cron access (see `templates/website` + `templates/with-vercel-website`). Same role as `NEXT_PRIVATE_CRON_KEY` — either may be set.

COMMIT_DOCS_API_KEY.description: Optional. API key for internal docs commit webhook (`collections/Docs`). Treat as secret.

COMMIT_DOCS_API_URL.description: Optional. Endpoint URL paired with `COMMIT_DOCS_API_KEY` for docs automation.

COOKIE_DOMAIN.description: Optional. Auth cookie `domain` for Payload Users (`collections/Users.ts`). Often empty locally.

DATABASE_URL.description: **Postgres** (`postgres://…`) on Vercel, or **MongoDB** (`mongodb://…` / `mongodb+srv://…`) when using `@payloadcms/db-mongodb`. Empty on pure Cloudflare D1.

DISABLE_SECURE_COOKIE.description: Optional. Set to disable `Secure` / `SameSite=None` on auth cookies even in production (testing only).

DISCORD_SCRAPE_CHANNEL_ID.description: Optional. Discord channel ID for community-help scraping flows.

DISCORD_TOKEN.description: Optional. Discord bot token for integrations — secret.

DOCS_DIR_V2.description: Optional. Local filesystem path to v2 docs checkout (`src/scripts/fetchDocs.ts`).

DOCS_DIR_V3.description: Optional. Local filesystem path to v3 docs checkout (`src/scripts/fetchDocs.ts`).

GA_CREDENTIALS.description: Optional. Google Analytics Data API credentials JSON (server route `api/analytics/*`). Secret — store as Worker secret.

GA_PROPERTY_ID.description: Optional. GA4 property ID for server-side analytics routes.

GA_USE_DEMO_DATA.description: Optional. Set `true` to use demo data in analytics API routes instead of live GA.

GITHUB_ACCESS_TOKEN.description: Optional. GitHub PAT — `pnpm generate:llms` (add to **Build variables and secrets** for CI), docs branches, ContributionTable. See [Workers Builds configuration](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/ci-cd/builds/configuration/).

MONGODB_URL.description: MongoDB connection string — **Node / Vercel only** (`templates/with-vercel-mongodb`). Do not set on Cloudflare Workers deploys.

NEXT_PUBLIC_ALGOLIA_CH_ID.description: Public (inlined at build). Algolia app ID for community help search — set in **Build** env for Workers Builds.

NEXT_PUBLIC_ALGOLIA_CH_INDEX_NAME.description: Public. Algolia index name for community help.

NEXT_PUBLIC_ALGOLIA_DOCSEARCH_KEY.description: Public. Algolia search-only API key for Docsearch component.

NEXT_PUBLIC_ALGOLIA_PUBLIC_KEY.description: Public. Algolia search client key for community help UI.

NEXT_PUBLIC_CLOUD_CMS_URL.description: Public. Payload Cloud GraphQL/API base URL for in-app cloud flows.

NEXT_PUBLIC_CMS_URL.description: Public. This deployment’s CMS origin for media URLs, RichText `serverURL`, etc.

NEXT_PUBLIC_ENABLE_BETA_DOCS.description: Public. `true` to surface beta docs routes.

NEXT_PUBLIC_ENABLE_LEGACY_DOCS.description: Public. `true` to surface legacy (v2) docs routes.

NEXT_PUBLIC_GITHUB_CLIENT_ID.description: Public. GitHub OAuth client ID for Cloud onboarding flows.

NEXT_PUBLIC_GITHUB_REDIRECT_URI.description: Public. GitHub OAuth redirect URI registered with the OAuth app.

NEXT_PUBLIC_GTM_MEASUREMENT_ID.description: Public. Google Tag Manager container ID when using GTM component.

NEXT_PUBLIC_IMAGE_REMOTE_HOSTS.description: Public. Extra image hostnames for `next.config.js` `remotePatterns` (comma-separated or as configured).

NEXT_PUBLIC_IS_LIVE.description: Public. When set, tightens image hosts / production behavior in `next.config.js`.

NEXT_PUBLIC_NEWSLETTER_FORM_ID.description: Public. HubSpot or form embed ID for newsletter block.

NEXT_PUBLIC_OMIT_CLOUD_ERRORS.description: Public. `true` to hide Cloud GraphQL errors in the Auth provider (demo/support).

NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL.description: Optional. Alias used in official templates (`getServerSideURL`); this repo prefers `PAYLOAD_PUBLIC_APP_URL` / `NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL` first in `src/utilities/getURL.ts`.

NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL.description: Public. Canonical browser URL of this site (metadata, OG, sitemap, redirects).

NEXT_PUBLIC_SKIP_BUILD_DOCS.description: Public. Skip docs page generation during build when truthy.

NEXT_PUBLIC_SKIP_BUILD_HELPS.description: Public. Skip community-help build paths when truthy.

NEXT_PUBLIC_STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY.description: Public. Stripe publishable key for Checkout embedded UI.

NEXT_PRIVATE_ALGOLIA_API_KEY.description: Secret. Algolia admin/search key for server-side community-help indexing — Worker secret.

NEXT_PRIVATE_CRON_KEY.description: Secret. Shared key for cron-triggered routes (if configured).

NEXT_PRIVATE_DRAFT_SECRET.description: Secret. Preview/draft mode secret — must match draft URL generation (`formatPreviewURL`).

NEXT_PRIVATE_HUBSPOT_PORTAL_KEY.description: Secret. HubSpot portal ID / key for form integrations in Payload config.

NEXT_PRIVATE_RECAPTCHA_SECRET_KEY.description: Secret. reCAPTCHA server-side verification key (Payload forms).

NEXT_PRIVATE_REVALIDATION_KEY.description: Secret. On-demand ISR/revalidate API (`api/revalidate`) — must match internal `revalidate` utility.

PAYLOAD_ADMIN_FAVICON_URL.description: Optional. Absolute or `/` URL for admin favicon (`admin.meta.icons`, `examples/whitelabel`).

PAYLOAD_ADMIN_META_DESCRIPTION.description: Optional. Meta description for Payload admin (`admin.meta.description`).

PAYLOAD_ADMIN_TITLE_SUFFIX.description: Optional. Title suffix in Payload admin (`admin.meta.titleSuffix`, `examples/whitelabel`).

PAYLOAD_CORS_ORIGINS.description: Comma-separated allowed origins for Payload CORS (`payload.config.ts`).

PAYLOAD_DB_ADAPTER.description: Optional. Set `mongodb` to use `@payloadcms/db-mongodb` when the URL would otherwise be ambiguous. Usually inferred from `MONGODB_URL` / `DATABASE_URL`.

PAYLOAD_ECOMMERCE.description: Optional. Set `true` to enable `@payloadcms/plugin-ecommerce` (beta — `templates/ecommerce`). Uses `users` as customers; Stripe checkout wiring is separate (`payments.paymentMethods`). Run `payload migrate` after enabling.

PAYLOAD_ECOMMERCE_VARIANTS.description: Optional. With `PAYLOAD_ECOMMERCE`, set `true` to enable variant collections (`variants`, `variantTypes`, `variantOptions`). Run `payload migrate` after enabling.

PAYLOAD_HOSTING.description: Optional override: `cloudflare` | `vercel` — forces stack when CI env would otherwise mis-detect (`deploymentTarget.ts`).

PAYLOAD_MULTI_TENANT.description: Optional. Set `true` to enable `@payloadcms/plugin-multi-tenant` on the `pages` collection + `tenants` (`examples/multi-tenant`). Run `payload migrate` after enabling.

PAYLOAD_PUBLIC_APP_URL.description: Server-accessible canonical app URL for Payload serverURL/CORS (often same origin as `NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL`).

PAYLOAD_RELEASE_SECRET.description: Secret. Shared with GitHub Actions for release automation webhooks.

PAYLOAD_SECRET.description: Required. Payload encryption/session secret — generate `openssl rand -hex 32`. Must appear in Worker **Variables & Secrets** and **Build variables and secrets** for migrate — [Workers Builds configuration](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/ci-cd/builds/configuration/).

POSTGRES_URL.description: Postgres URL — **Vercel relational stack**. Leave unset on Workers+D1 to avoid misrouting migrate (`deploymentTarget.ts`).

SENDGRID_API_KEY.description: Optional. SendGrid API key when using nodemailer transport (`payload.config.ts`). Secret.

SITEMAP_URL.description: Canonical site URL for `next-sitemap` generation (defaults to payloadcms.com if unset).

STRIPE_SECRET_KEY.description: Secret. Stripe secret API key — billing routes and (with publishable key + `PAYLOAD_ECOMMERCE`) `plugin-ecommerce` payments adapter.

STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET.description: Optional. Stripe webhook signing secret (`whsec_…`) for ecommerce plugin `/api/payments/stripe/webhooks`. Same as `STRIPE_WEBHOOKS_SIGNING_SECRET` if you use that name.

SYNC_BATCH_LIMIT.description: Optional. Numeric batch size override for `fetchGitHub.ts` sync scripts.

VERCEL.description: Read-only: Vercel sets `VERCEL=1` in CI. Used with `POSTGRES_URL` for stack detection — do not set for Cloudflare-only deploys.

VERCEL_REDEPLOY_URL.description: Optional. Vercel deploy hook URL — used by `redeployWebsite.ts` script.
